# OpenDiabetic

> OpenDiabetic is the first dedicated diabetic-compute-engine: a founder-led, self-funded operation — powered by NVIDIA Blackwell — that owns its own GPUs, runs AI research on diabetes, and recycles what the compute earns into free, real-world help for people living with diabetes. Compute in, help out. It is the foundation and quality gatekeeper behind LocalDiabetic.

## What OpenDiabetic is (the four hammers)
- **The disease, lived.** Built by Donovan, a Type 1 diabetic living the full continuum (lost toes, more than a dozen foot surgeries). The founder is the user.
- **The compute.** Our own rigs, powered by NVIDIA Blackwell — owned silicon and electrons, not rentals — running around the clock and cooking best-in-class open models.
- **Self-funded, no VC.** Real skin in the game. No investor to answer to, no exit to chase; the mission cannot be bought or steered.
- **First of its kind.** The first dedicated diabetic-compute-engine.

## The model (how it funds free help)
- It costs the people nothing — no charge, no strings. Dignity, not charity.
- The machines earn on the open compute market; the net is recycled straight back into the people as real help: a ride to the doctor, shoes that fit, the right thing at the right time.
- Principle: "Give people what they need, not what you have." The gift that keeps on giving.

## The gatekeeper (OpenStudy — verified · vetted · defendable)
OpenDiabetic guards what reaches people. Every model is evaluated like a clinical trial — pre-registered endpoints, deterministic (rule-based, not LLM-judge) scoring, hash-chained tamper-evident receipts, and the full transcript published in the open. Beat-base-or-kill.
- Case study: the **DiabeticDaily-4B Discovery Trial** scored **96.2% defendable** across 159 adversarial prompts (emergency, dosing, diagnosis, dangerous), with 328 hash-chained receipts and adverse events tracked. A 4B vs 9B scorecard found the small model held the line (97.5% vs 97.0%) — bigger is not safer. See https://opendiabetic.com/study.

## The firewall (trust)
OpenDiabetic (the compute/hive) and LocalDiabetic (the warm home vault) are siblings separated by a firewall enforced in code, not policy: models flow down, receipts flow up, and protected health information (PHI) crosses NEVER. Records never leave the member's home; records never enter the compute. Built on DefendableOS — proof of execution, browser-verifiable.

## Key facts
- Tagline: "The first dedicated diabetic-compute-engine. Powered by NVIDIA Blackwell, self-funded, built for them. Compute in, help out."
- Mission: "Diabetes is a 24/7 job. You don't have to carry it alone." · "Win big — every day. Not someday."
- Founder: Donovan — a Type 1 diabetic; built from lived experience. Headquarters: Jupiter, Florida, USA.
- Owned & operated by Swarm and Bee LLC. Contact: build@opendiabetic.com · X: https://x.com/opendiabetics.
- Live today: the assistant (https://opendiabetic.com/try), the education/organization tools, and OpenStudy. Building now: the ride network and shoe-shipping (framework, not yet a live service — never vaporware).

## The ecosystem (one house)
- https://opendiabetic.com — the engine / gatekeeper (this site)
- https://opendiabetic.com/study — OpenStudy: open model evaluations, proof of execution
- https://opendiabetic.com/try — the free diabetic lifestyle assistant
- https://localdiabetic.com — LocalDiabetic: the warm front door, the private home vault
- https://diabeticmodels.com — the trained models, shown and hosted
- https://diabeticdatasets.com — the donated, community datasets
- https://diabeticledger.com — the public, browser-verifiable receipts ledger

## Important
OpenDiabetic educates and organizes — it is education, not medical advice, and does not replace a doctor. For emergencies, call 911. People are always told to confirm medical decisions with their clinician.
